allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const c = fs.readFileSync\('src/poem-workshop/BackgroundPicker.tsx'\); console.log\('bytes:', [...c.slice\(0,20\)].map\(b => b.toString\(16\)\).join\(' '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const c = fs.readFileSync\('src/poem-workshop/BackgroundPicker.tsx'\); const s = c.toString\('utf8'\); const lines = s.split\('\\n'\); lines.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(\(l,i\) => { console.log\(i+1, JSON.stringify\(l\)\); }\);")
